title: Having trouble making a new item from the phone number format. ERROR 200
excerpt:

posts.author: Aliq21 (Christian Higgins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Very confused here, I literally have the same exact setup on two different workflows and it works fine… Here I am getting information from a lead via a webhook, and sending it to monday.com.

However I am getting a 200 ERROR [invalid value] for all the ways i’ve parsed the phone number. I’m using make.com & have tried zapier and it had the same issue.

I’ve formatted as all of the following formats.

National format (555) XXX-XXXX
International format +1 555-XXX-XXXX
Number in E.164 format +1555XXXXXXX
Number in RFC 3966 format tel:+1-555-XXX-XXXX
![image 690x350](upload://qWd6t9T4kGs57Quj5rNQvyuslgd.png)

posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Christian, hope that you’re doing great.

I can see this picture but I think we might need to format Make.com automation properly to get this rolling.

Are you available to meet and connect regarding this?
